metaDescription: Mistral Medium 3.5 (Mistral AI), released 2026-04-28 — part of the Mistral Medium line. 128B frontier-class multimodal model merging chat, reasoning and code;…
overview: Mistral Medium 3.5 is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral Medium line. Released 2026-04-28. Mid-tier line balancing cost and capability for enterprise workloads.
What's notable in this version: 128B frontier-class multimodal model merging chat, reasoning and code; open weights (Modified MIT), 256k context, $1.5/$7.5 per Mtok.
